code: import React from'react';import{NavLink}from'react-router-dom';import{motion}from'framer-motion';import{useUser}from'../context/UserContext';import{jsx as _jsx,jsxs as _jsxs}from"react/jsx-runtime";const BottomNav=()=>{const{isAdmin}=useUser();const navItems=[{path:'/',label:'Дом',icon:'🏠'},{path:'/market',label:'Маркет',icon:'🛒'},{path:'/roulette',label:'Рулетка',icon:'🎰'},{path:'/friends',label:'Друзья',icon:'👥'},{path:'/tasks',label:'Задания',icon:'📋'},...(isAdmin?[{path:'/admin',label:'Админ',icon:'⚙️'}]:[])];return/*#__PURE__*/_jsx(motion.nav,{className:"bottom-nav",initial:{y:100},animate:{y:0},transition:{type:'spring',stiffness:300,damping:30},children:navItems.map(item=>/*#__PURE__*/_jsxs(NavLink,{to:item.path,className:_ref=>{let{isActive}=_ref;return"nav-item ".concat(isActive?'active':'');},children:[/*#__PURE__*/_jsx("span",{className:"nav-icon",children:item.icon}),/*#__PURE__*/_jsx("span",{className:"nav-label",children:item.label})]},item.path))});};export default BottomNav;
